mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM after_sales WHERE asr_id IN
#{item}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO after_sales(asr_id, order_id,customer_id,product_id, issue_type,issue_description, status,resolved_by_user_id,resolution_notes,createTime,updateTime)
VALUES (#{asrId}, #{orderId},#{customerId},#{productId}, #{issueType},#{issueDescription}, #{status},#{resolvedByUserId},#{resolutionNotes},#{createTime}, #{updateTime})
